name: Whispering Caves
description: Deep beneath the foothills, an ancient network of caves hums with crystalline energy. A reclusive hermit warns of stirring shadows, and a forgotten altar holds the key to the caves' whispered secrets.

crystal_shard.name: Glowing Crystal Shard
crystal_shard.description: A warm, faintly humming crystal shard. It pulses with a soft blue light.

cave_map.name: Faded Cave Map
cave_map.description: A crumbling parchment marked with Orin's annotations of the cave network.

shadow_essence.name: Shadow Essence
shadow_essence.description: A wisp of cold darkness left behind by a defeated shade.

dialogues.orin_greeting: Ah, another wanderer drawn by the whispers. I am Orin — I've studied these caves for decades. The crystals are growing restless, and something ancient stirs in the depths. If you're brave enough to help, I may have supplies.
dialogues.shade_hiss: SSssss... the light... it BURNSSS... leave this place, surface-dweller, or be CONSUMED.
dialogues.orin_quest_start: The altar at the heart of this cavern once held back the darkness. Now the shadows leak through — I've seen them, wisps of cold malice. Bring me three shadow essences from the shades that roam these tunnels, and I may be able to reinforce the ward.
dialogues.orin_quest_complete: Three essences! You've done it. With these, I can re-weave the containment glyph. The caves will sleep peacefully for another century. You have my gratitude — and a few items from my stores.
dialogues.orin_quest_incomplete: Not yet — the shades still roam. Three essences, that's what I need. Be careful — they drain warmth from the living.

whispers_of_darkness.name: Whispers of Darkness
whispers_of_darkness.description: Orin the Hermit needs three shadow essences from the shades haunting the caves to reinforce the ancient ward.

objectives.description: Collect 3 Shadow Essences from Whispering Shades
